final:
module D_FlipFlop(
   input         D,
   input         clk,
   input         rst,
   output reg    Q  
);
    always@(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
    begin end  // redundant
        if(rst) begin
            Q <= 1'b0;
        end else begin
            Q <= D;
        end
    end
endmodule
